lead.description: Coordinates software delivery and enforces scalable architecture guardrails before delegating work.

implementer.description: Writes clean working code following modular architecture, Godot decoupling, HAL, and telemetry guardrails.

reviewer.description: Critically evaluates implementations for correctness, maintainability, security, and architecture boundary violations.

qa.description: Creates and runs tests for all layers and verifies contract/boundary coverage.
